languages.text: "Разве ты не требовал вернуть Себериана в твою коллекцию!?"
"Didn't you demand that Seberian be returned to your collection?"
languages.original_text: "Разве ты не требовал вернуть Себериана в твою коллекцию!?"

traits.locale_text: "Didn't you demand that Seberian be returned to your collection?"
"Didn't you demand that Seberian be returned to your collection?"
"Didn't you demand that Seberian be returned to your collection?"

languages.text: «¿No querías que Seberian volviese a tu colección?».
languages.original_text: "Didn't you demand that Seberian be returned to your collection?"

traits.locale_text: «¿No querías que Seberian volviese a tu colección?».

languages.text: “你不是要让塞贝里安重新成为你的收藏品吗？”
languages.original_text: "Didn't you demand that Seberian be returned to your collection?"

traits.locale_text: “你不是要让塞贝里安重新成为你的收藏品吗？”

languages.text: « N'aviez-vous pas exigé que Seberian soit restitué à votre collection ? »
languages.original_text: "Didn't you demand that Seberian be returned to your collection?"

traits.locale_text: « N'aviez-vous pas exigé que Seberian soit restitué à votre collection ? »

languages.text: "Seberian'ın koleksiyonuna iade edilmesini talep etmemiş miydin?"
languages.original_text: "Didn't you demand that Seberian be returned to your collection?"

traits.locale_text: "Seberian'ın koleksiyonuna iade edilmesini talep etmemiş miydin?"

languages.text: "Hattet Ihr nicht verlangt, dass Seberian in Eure Sammlung zurückkehrt?"
languages.original_text: "Didn't you demand that Seberian be returned to your collection?"

traits.locale_text: "Hattet Ihr nicht verlangt, dass Seberian in Eure Sammlung zurückkehrt?"

languages.text: 「シベリアを自分のコレクションに戻すよう要求したのではないですか？」
languages.original_text: "Didn't you demand that Seberian be returned to your collection?"

traits.locale_text: 「シベリアを自分のコレクションに戻すよう要求したのではないですか？」
